title: HIV ALLIANCE - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE DOUGLAS COUNTY HIV ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health care, supported services, social and recreational programs, videos, articles, and brochures. 647 W Luellen Drive Suite 3 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV and their families, friends, and loved ones Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 342-5088 162 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 342-5088 Ext: 162 Main phone (866) 470-3419 Toll-free Main phone (541) 342-5088 ext 162 Toll-free (866) 470-3419 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-5pm Services: AIDS/HIV Clinics General Recreational Activities/Sports * AIDS/HIV Issues Specialized Information and Referral * AIDS/HIV Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV+ CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ALLIANCE FOR COMMUNITY WELLNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
